row.answer:
14 Children's Books have received an average rating of at least 4.5 based on reviews from 2020 onwards. These books span various subcategories including Science Fiction & Fantasy, Geography & Cultures, Growing Up & Facts of Life, Literature & Fiction, History, Education & Reference, Activities/Crafts & Games, and Comics & Graphic Novels. Some notable titles include:

1. Monstrous Stories #4: The Day the Mice Stood Still
2. The Old Man and the Pirate Princess
3. Egypt (Enchantment of the World)
4. Clark the Shark: Tooth Trouble, No. 1
5. Favorite Thorton W. Burgess Stories: 6 Books
6. Cheer Up, Ben Franklin! (Young Historians)
7. Cleo Porter and the Body Electric
8. Pokémon: Sun & Moon, Vol. 8

These books represent a diverse range of genres within children's literature, all maintaining high reader satisfaction with ratings of 4.5 or above since 2020.

ops.validate_reason: Missing book title in LLM output: Around the World Mazes

db_routes.query_preview:
SELECT purchase_id, 
       AVG(rating) as avg_rating, 
       COUNT(*) as review_count
FROM review 
WHERE review_time >= '2020-01-01'
GROUP BY purchase_id
HAVING avg_rating >= 4.5
